2341220.name: Abaddon
2341220.description:
Abaddon is a first-person psychological horror game, featuring disturbing gameplay and a haunting, character-driven narrative. 

STORYLINE

What would you do if your little brother disappeared without a trace… and the only path forward led to a place shaped by fear, not physics? Play as Jimmy, a 22-year-old dragged into a collapsing reality, where memory, guilt, and grief twist the world around him. To find your brother Georgie you’ll have to confront the horrors of your past — and a world that was never meant to be seen. Will you uncover the truth, or be consumed by it?

Characters:

Everyone in the game has a story — twisted, broken, and all too human. The deeper you go, the more their secrets intertwine with yours. But beware: every step forward draws the eyes of something large, and hungry.

Gameplay:

Explore a Lovecraftian world, surreal world full of puzzles, pain, torture and cosmic dread. Use your flashlight and your wits to survive — And remember, although you are on your own own, you are never alone in the darkness.

Note from team:

We are an indie games studio called "Nice to Meet Studios LTD" that has been playing horror games for over a decade. Our love for the genre has led us to create "Abaddon", a game that aims to provide the best and scariest horror experience possible. Inspired by classic horror games such as Amnesia: The Dark Descent, P.T., Outlast, Visage, MADiSON, Detention, Resident Evil, and many more, "Abaddon" is designed to terrify players like never before.

Our goal is to make the players suffer and terrify them in a never-before-seen horror experience. If you think you're brave enough, we'd love for you to try to beat it - if you dare. Lose yourself in the world of "Abaddon"
2341220.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
